steps.title: Compare actual and modeled ratings
steps.content: The question says P1 actually gave equal ratings to impressionist and color-field paintings. The graph's different correlations for the two styles indicate that the model's predictions did not track those equal actual ratings the same way.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported direction
steps.content: Choice A and Choice C infer which style the model predicted P1 would enjoy more, but the correlation gap does not show direction. Choice D says the model predicted equal ratings, which would not fit the unequal correlations. The graph supports predicted ratings differing. The answer is B.
